title: Mr. Cat's Recipe Mod / Crafting+
description: Adds some recipes I feel are missing from vanilla.
body:
### !!! **this is my first mod so it might be buggy** !!!
this is a mod that adds some more recipes that arent / were in vanilla
some examples:

<details>
<summary>Unpackable Nether Wart Block</summary>

![Unpackable Nether Wart Block](https://i.imgur.com/ovik0pQ.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Craftable enchanted golden apple</summary>

![Craftable enchanted golden apple](https://i.imgur.com/bzzaBjy.png)

</details>
